    All Packages

    Package Summary
    Package
    Description
    team44.project2
    Root package for the Project 2 point-of-sale application built by Team 44.
    team44.project2.controller
    Top-level controller package containing shared interfaces used across all role-specific controller sub-packages.
    team44.project2.controller.auth
    Controllers responsible for the authentication flow of the application.
    team44.project2.controller.cashier
    Controllers for the cashier-facing screens of the point-of-sale application.
    team44.project2.controller.cashier.ordering
    Controllers that manage the item-ordering workflow for cashiers.
    team44.project2.controller.cashier.payment
    Controllers that manage the payment workflow after a cashier finalises a cart.
    team44.project2.controller.manager
    Controllers for the manager-facing screens of the point-of-sale application.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.employees
    Controllers for the employee-management screens accessible to managers.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.inventory
    Controllers for the inventory-management screens accessible to managers.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.menu
    Controllers for the menu-management screens accessible to managers.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.reports
    Controllers for the reporting screens accessible to managers.
    team44.project2.model
    Domain model package containing Java records and classes that represent the core business entities of the point-of-sale system.
    team44.project2.model.menu
    Model classes representing menu-related entities.
    team44.project2.model.menu.enums
    Enumerations for the customisation options available when ordering a menu item.
    team44.project2.model.order
    Model classes representing an order and its constituent parts.
    team44.project2.model.report
    Model classes that carry aggregated reporting data returned by ReportService.
    team44.project2.service
    Application-scoped service classes that encapsulate the business logic and direct database access for the point-of-sale system.
    team44.project2.service.inventory
    Service classes for inventory management operations.
    team44.project2.util
    General-purpose utility classes shared across all layers of the application.
